last_3_messages_summary:
This screen displays a chat conversation between a user, Sai, and an AI assistant named Bujji. The assistant initially confirms saving a mobile agent rule and running an Amazon "carry bags" search on Sai's phone. After Sai clarifies the task should be on a laptop, Bujji stops the mobile agent, opens Amazon on the laptop, and performs the search.

Bujji then adds a specific, highly-rated "DOUBLE R BAGS" item to Sai's Amazon cart, noting it was a limited-time deal. The conversation concludes with Sai thanking Bujji, who offers further assistance for tests, code, or shopping. Visible UI elements include chat input fields, a "Bot menu," and "Web tabs."
bujji_summary: The screen displays a chat conversation between a user, Sai, and a helpful bot named Bujji. Bujji successfully added a highly-rated "DOUBLE R BAGS Big Heavy Duty Eco Cotton Canvas Grocery Shopping Bag" (a limited-time deal) to Sai's Amazon cart. After Sai thanked the bot, Bujji offered further assistance, including searching for other items, running tests, building code, or more shopping. The interface shows chat input options like "Bot menu" and "Send," alongside navigation elements such as "Go back" and "Web tabs."
